SHORT::SHORT REJECTION PLAN.title: Short rejection plan
SHORT::SHORT REJECTION PLAN.trigger: If BTC runs into 80,302.13 (1H EMA21, 4H EMA55, Dump) with an extension into major short-liq zone 81,336.82 and rejects on 15m, short the fade.
SHORT::SHORT REJECTION PLAN.note: Use only after rejection confirmation. Cross-exchange funding leans short.

SHORT::SHORT BREAKDOWN PLAN.title: Short breakdown plan
SHORT::SHORT BREAKDOWN PLAN.trigger: If BTC closes below 78,584.83 (WO, 1H swing low, 4H swing low) and then targets OKX far-zone 78,877.90 and fails the retest, short continuation.
SHORT::SHORT BREAKDOWN PLAN.note: Use only if support is lost cleanly and downside momentum expands.

LONG::LONG PULLBACK PLAN.title: Long pullback plan
LONG::LONG PULLBACK PLAN.trigger: If BTC sweeps 76,638.00 (DumpMax) with a flush into major long-liq zone 74,430.62 and reclaims on 15m, long the bounce.
LONG::LONG PULLBACK PLAN.note: Use only after reclaim confirmation. Funding supports this long. Shorts look more vulnerable.

SHORT::SHORT MAJOR LIQ SQUEEZE PLAN.title: Short major liq squeeze plan
SHORT::SHORT MAJOR LIQ SQUEEZE PLAN.trigger: If BTC squeezes into major short-liq zone 80,992.85 and fails back below it, short the reversal.
SHORT::SHORT MAJOR LIQ SQUEEZE PLAN.note: This is a deeper squeeze plan, not the first rejection entry.

LONG::LONG CONTINUATION RETEST PLAN.title: Long continuation retest plan
LONG::LONG CONTINUATION RETEST PLAN.trigger: If BTC reclaims 80,064.54 and holds the retest, long continuation.
LONG::LONG CONTINUATION RETEST PLAN.note: This is an extra nearby continuation plan when the first long options are too limited.

LONG::LONG BREAKOUT PLAN.title: Long breakout plan
LONG::LONG BREAKOUT PLAN.trigger: If BTC closes above 79,246.72 (DO, PWL, 1H EMA21) and then targets OKX far-zone 79,446.10 and holds the retest, long continuation.
LONG::LONG BREAKOUT PLAN.note: Use only if momentum holds and no pullback entry appears first.
